tests.title: Factory v5 has on-chain bytecode
tests.desc: Factory 0x291295B88fC35dcA3208f7cCC3DFc1a2921167E8 bytecode: 802 bytes.

tests.title: Impl v5 has on-chain bytecode
tests.desc: Implementation 0x92956109d96845f6FeA51F1042B26709756C7F31 bytecode: 11157 bytes.

tests.title: Create Vault A (Wallet A) via factory
tests.desc: Vault A at 0x3F8Ea229bfB8fE70d2bB524431bbCD09F2018F26 — EIP-1167 clone, created from factory.

tests.title: Create Vault B (Wallet B) via factory
tests.desc: Vault B at 0xdeFB7480c6f106Cb8E06F62f9Ac03DAa3EB4a035 — separate EIP-1167 clone, isolated storage.

tests.title: Approve USDC for Vault A (15 USDC)
tests.desc: Wallet A approved Vault A to spend 15 USDC via ERC-20 approve().

tests.title: shield() 10 USDC — correct proof
tests.desc: Vault A already has 10.0 qUSDC. Shield from previous run confirmed.

tests.title: shield() with wrong proof — revert expected
tests.desc: shield() with incorrect proofHash reverts 'Invalid vault proof'. Raw password never exposed on-chain.

tests.title: shield() from non-owner Wallet B — revert expected
tests.desc: Wallet B cannot call Vault A. Reverts 'Not vault owner'. onlyOwner strictly enforced.

tests.title: shield() amount below 1e6 minimum — revert expected
tests.desc: Amounts < MINIMUM_SHIELD_AMOUNT (1e6) revert 'Amount below minimum'. Prevents dust attacks.

tests.title: commitTransfer() — hash intent to send 5 USDC to Wallet B
tests.desc: commitHash = keccak256(abi.encodePacked(proofHash, nonce, token, to, amount)). Two-layer hash: password never in calldata.

tests.title: revealTransfer() with non-existent commit — revert expected
tests.desc: Reveal with no matching commit reverts 'Commit not found'. Prevents replay-without-commit attacks.

tests.title: revealTransfer() with wrong proof — revert expected
tests.desc: Wrong proofHash in revealTransfer reverts 'Invalid vault proof'. Password protected at reveal phase.

tests.title: revealTransfer() — 5 USDC from Vault A to Wallet B
tests.desc: 5 USDC transferred. Wallet B: 5.0 USDC. Vault A remaining: 5.0 qUSDC. Event TransferExecuted emitted.

tests.title: Replay used/non-existent commitHash — revert expected
tests.desc: Re-using a consumed nonce or non-existent commit reverts. Replay attack prevention confirmed.

tests.title: changeVaultProof() — rotate to new password hash
tests.desc: Vault proof rotated PROOF1 → PROOF2. Both params bytes32 hashes. Event VaultProofChanged. Raw passwords never on-chain.

tests.title: shield() with OLD proof after changeVaultProof — revert expected
tests.desc: Old PROOF1 rejected after rotation. Reverts 'Invalid vault proof'. Key rotation enforced.

tests.title: shield() 3 USDC with NEW proof after changeVaultProof — success
tests.desc: New proof PROOF2 accepted. 3 USDC shielded. Vault A qUSDC: 8.0.

tests.title: unshield() 2 USDC back to Wallet A — success
tests.desc: Vault burns 2 qUSDC → transfers 2 USDC to Wallet A. Wallet A: 9.0 USDC. Event TokenUnshielded.

tests.title: unshield() over shielded balance — revert expected
tests.desc: Requesting more than balance reverts 'Insufficient shielded balance'. Over-withdrawal protected.

tests.title: Create EIP-712 QryptAir voucher — Wallet A signs offline
tests.desc: Wallet A signs Voucher struct off-chain. transferCodeHash = keccak256(transferCode). Raw transferCode never enters calldata. Local ECDSA verify: signer matches Wallet A.

tests.title: redeemAirVoucher() — Wallet B redeems 2 USDC voucher
tests.desc: Wallet B calls redeemAirVoucher (anyone with valid sig can redeem). 2 USDC delivered. Wallet B USDC: 7.0. Vault: 4.0 qUSDC. Event AirVoucherRedeemed.

tests.title: redeemAirVoucher() replay same nonce — revert expected
tests.desc: Re-using a redeemed voucher nonce reverts 'Voucher already redeemed'. One-time-use nonces enforced.

tests.title: redeemAirVoucher() expired deadline — revert expected
tests.desc: Deadline in the past reverts 'Voucher expired'. Time-bound protection working.

tests.title: redeemAirVoucher() signature over wrong transferCodeHash — revert expected
tests.desc: Sig signed over wrong hash. ECDSA.recover returns wrong address. Reverts 'Sig not from vault owner'. Voucher integrity enforced.

tests.title: redeemAirVoucher() signed by non-vault-owner — revert expected
tests.desc: Sig from Wallet B (not Vault A owner) reverts 'Sig not from vault owner'. ECDSA checks vault.owner.

tests.title: unshieldToRailgun() with wrong proof — revert expected
tests.desc: Wrong proofHash reverts 'Invalid vault proof'. Password protection on QryptShield atomic function.

tests.title: unshieldToRailgun() with zero railgunProxy — revert expected
tests.desc: Zero address as Railgun proxy reverts 'Invalid Railgun proxy'. Prevents accidental ETH/token burn.

tests.title: unshieldToRailgun() amount over shielded balance — revert expected
tests.desc: Over-balance amount reverts 'Insufficient shielded balance'. CEI: checks before burn.

tests.title: unshieldToRailgun() contract logic — mock Railgun proxy
tests.desc: 1 qUSDC burned, USDC approve granted+revoked atomically, Railgun proxy called (mock EOA). Contract logic verified. Full ZK integration requires Railgun SDK: UI/SDK test only.

tests.title: Re-initialize already-initialized vault — revert expected
tests.desc: initialize() on existing vault reverts 'Already initialized'. notInitialized modifier working.

tests.title: emergencyWithdraw() before 1,296,000-block timelock — revert expected
tests.desc: Emergency withdraw available at block 11925868, current block 10629868. Blocks remaining: 1296000. ~180 day timelock active.

tests.title: Any vault function from non-owner — revert expected
tests.desc: Wallet B cannot call Vault A's onlyOwner functions. Reverts 'Not vault owner'. Access control confirmed.
